steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The underlined portions use a metaphor comparing speech about art to “hewn out” with “an ill-balanced axe” where “strokes had gone awry”—language that emphasizes difficulty and failure, not successful execution.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B identifies the exact function: it emphasizes the struggle people face when articulating thoughts on art.

The other three either treat the metaphor as literal construction, focus on understanding rather than expressing thoughts, or center on group dynamics instead of individual articulation difficulty.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
